dict.string: Aura reads HRV, sleep, heart rate, and step count to compute your Wellness Load Score on-device. Nothing leaves the device.
Aura does not write to HealthKit.
Aura reads your calendar so the Calendar agent can surface conflicts, travel-time alerts, and the morning brief. Calendar data stays on the device.
Aura reads your calendar so the Calendar agent can surface conflicts, travel-time alerts, and the morning brief. Calendar data stays on the device.
Aura sends at most three proactive nudges per day, capped by the Silence Budget. You can lower the cap to zero in Settings.
Aura uses contacts only to label senders in your inbox digest. Contact entries are not exported.
Aura uses your local Wi-Fi to hand off the current card between your iPhone, iPad, and Mac. Nothing is sent to the internet.
